privacy.deletePrompt: Type your email to confirm permanent account deletion.

empty.noSpacesHelper: Create your first space to get started
empty.noSearchResultsHelper: Try a different space or thread name.

sidebar.spaceSettingsSubtitle: Control shared context for every chat in this space.
sidebar.scopeMemory: Memory is personal to you and follows your account.
sidebar.scopeWorkspace: Workspace instructions and workspace files become shared context for every chat inside this space.
sidebar.scopeChat: Files added from chat are saved to the space so they can be used across chats.
sidebar.sharedContextSubtitle: Everything here shapes chats across this space.
sidebar.instructionsBody: Guidance ZAKI follows across every chat in this space.
sidebar.knowledgeFilesBody: Reusable files available to every chat in this space.
sidebar.contextSummarySpaceBody: Shared across chats in this space.
sidebar.contextSummaryThreadBody: Short-lived chat context stays temporary unless it becomes lasting memory.
sidebar.dangerZoneBody: Delete this space only if you no longer need its chats or shared context.
sidebar.workspaceFilesHintWithTypes: These files are embedded once and can be used across chats in this space. Supported types: {{types}}
sidebar.workspaceFilesHint: These files are embedded once and can be used across chats in this space.
sidebar.workspaceFilesEmpty: No workspace knowledge files yet. Upload files here when you want them available across chats in this space.
sidebar.removeDocumentSuccess: {{name}} removed from workspace knowledge. Existing conversation history may still reference prior discussion.

profileEditor.title: Profile
profileEditor.subtitle: Update your display name and photo

empty.headline: Ready when you are
empty.subtext: Choose a next step, or pick a prompt to get moving fast.
examples: Remember this: I prefer concise answers and weekly plans. Start by planning my next 7 days.
Summarize this meeting into decisions, owners, deadlines, and open risks: [paste notes].
Use Query mode on my uploaded files and answer: [your question].

home.heroSubtext: Use ZAKI as your personal AI partner for planning, drafting, explaining, and staying on top of what matters.
home.memoryOnHelper: ZAKI saves useful memory automatically. You can undo or delete it anytime.
home.memoryClarityBody: ZAKI quietly keeps helpful details in memory, gives you a short undo window, and only asks you to step in when something needs review.
ramadanExamples: Give me suggestions for today's Ramadan meals from my region that are easy to make.
Give me tips and tricks to survive fasting.
Draft Ramadan greetings to send to my family and friends.

quickStart.title: Plan my day for focus, energy, and calm.
quickStart.body: A full-day routine with work blocks, meals, and reset moments.

quickStart.title: Teach me something useful in 5 minutes.
quickStart.body: A fast lesson with examples and one simple exercise.

quickStart.title: Give me three smart ideas I can use today.
quickStart.body: Clear options for work, life, or learning with next steps.

missionSlides.title: More than a chat window
missionSlides.body: ZAKI is being built as a digital twin: something that remembers your context, understands your direction, and keeps pace with how you think.

missionSlides.title: Made to carry real weight
missionSlides.body: The point is not endless prompting. It is help that can plan, write, organize, and challenge ideas with enough continuity to feel genuinely useful.

missionSlides.title: It should scale with your life
missionSlides.body: As your work, ambition, and responsibilities grow, ZAKI should become more personal, more capable, and more present wherever you need it.

news.title: Helpful memory stays light
news.body: Safe details can be kept quietly, while anything uncertain stays ready for your review.

news.title: Possible conflicts stay explicit
news.body: When new details clash with saved memory, ZAKI asks you which version to keep.

memoryCards.title: Notice useful details
memoryCards.body: ZAKI picks up likely preferences, goals, and context from the conversations that matter.

memoryCards.title: Keep review for exceptions
memoryCards.body: Sensitive or uncertain details stay in review so you stay in control.

memoryCards.title: Flag possible conflicts
memoryCards.body: If new information contradicts saved memory, ZAKI asks before changing what it knows.

memoryCards.title: Use memory when it helps
memoryCards.body: Saved memory comes back when it makes future replies more useful.

capabilities: Remembers what you shared earlier in the conversation
Lets you correct or refine context over time
limitations: May sometimes miss nuance without enough context
Knowledge may be limited for very recent events

share.title: Share Conversation
share.subtitle: Create a shareable link
share.errorPasswordLength: Password must be at least 4 characters
share.successPublic: Anyone with this link can view the conversation
share.expires: This link will expire in 10 days.

chat.dropFiles: Drop files to add them to this space

input.disclaimer: Zaki can make mistakes. Consider checking important information.
input.uploadUnavailableToast: Add files to the space when you want them available across chats.

queryMode.label: Query mode
queryMode.onToast: Query mode enabled: answers now use documents uploaded to this space.
queryMode.offToast: Query mode is off. Back to normal chat.

webSearch.enableAriaLabel: Enable web search for the next message
webSearch.enableTitle: Use web search for the next message

zakiExperimentalNotice.title: ZAKI is still evolving.
zakiExperimentalNotice.intro: Use it like a capable operator: ask clearly, give context, and expect it to help plan, draft, research, and move work forward.
zakiExperimentalNotice.capability: ZAKI can use vetted tools and skills when a task needs more than a plain text reply.
zakiExperimentalNotice.footer: Important outputs should still be reviewed, especially when the task is high-stakes or time-sensitive.

zakiBootstrapCard.title: Tell ZAKI who you are and what you need.

arabic.headline: ابدأ بالطريقة الطبيعية لك.
arabic.body: قل لي من أنت، وما الذي تعمل عليه الآن، وكيف تريدني أن أساعدك. يمكنك أن تبدأ بالعربية أو بالإنجليزية.

english.label: Helpful first message
english.body: A strong first prompt includes who you are, what you are working on, and the kind of help you want from me.

zakiSettingsSheet.title: Tune how ZAKI shows up
zakiSettingsSheet.subtitle: Control assistant behavior, Telegram delivery, and autonomy from one place.

locked.title: Coming soon
locked.note: channels + advanced agent behavior coming soon; currently available in app only.

header.setupSummary: Core behavior first. Setup, channels, and limits stay tucked behind quick sections.

telegram.title: Telegram
telegram.summaryConnected: Connected and ready for external chat.
telegram.summaryDisconnected: Connect Telegram to deliver replies outside the app.
telegram.summaryNeedsAttention: Telegram needs attention before it is ready.

responseStyle.title: Response style
responseStyle.helper: Choose whether ZAKI leans toward speed, balance, or deeper reasoning.

sessionWindow.title: Session window
sessionWindow.helper: Choose how long ZAKI should treat nearby activity as one working session.

joinBehavior.title: When ZAKI joins
joinBehavior.helper: Control whether ZAKI waits for a mention or stays available in shared channel conversations.

proactiveUpdates.title: Proactive updates
proactiveUpdates.helper: Let ZAKI surface updates first instead of waiting for every prompt.

voiceReplies.title: Voice replies
voiceReplies.helper: Enable spoken responses when the channel supports them.

workspace.memorySummary: Review what ZAKI remembers and open help when you need product context.
workspace.memoryHelper: Memory stays editable. Help stays one step away.
workspace.channelsSummaryLine: {{connected}} of {{total}} channels are ready right now.
workspace.channelsHelper: Provider details stay hidden until you open one.

channelDescriptions.telegram: Connect Telegram so ZAKI can receive and reply through your bot.
channelDescriptions.slack: Keep Slack ready for workspace rollout.
channelDescriptions.discord: Keep Discord instructions nearby without opening a separate admin page.

overview.operatorRequired: Operator setup is still required before this user can start externally.
overview.readyToStart: This agent can start chatting now.
overview.missingRequirements: Some minimum requirements are still missing.
overview.operatorBlockingBody: Model and provider setup must be completed by the platform operator before this user can finish activation.
overview.readinessHelper: This status comes from onboarding and reflects whether external delivery is ready.
overview.telegramHelper: Connect Telegram so this agent can receive and answer outside the app.
overview.minimumRequiredHelper: These are the remaining prerequisites reported by onboarding.

telegram.statusHelper: Use your Telegram bot token and allowed chat IDs to activate delivery.
telegram.verifyingHelper: Telegram is being verified. This can take a few seconds after setup.
telegram.needsAttentionHelper: Telegram is not fully confirmed yet. If your bot already responds, refresh in a few seconds.
telegram.webhookBaseHelper: ZAKI manages the Telegram webhook domain for you. If setup fails, support can inspect the workspace webhook configuration.
telegram.allowFromPlaceholder: One chat ID or account ID per line, or separate with commas.
telegram.allowFromHelper: Optional. Add Telegram chat or account IDs if you want to restrict who can reach your agent. Leave it blank for the normal setup flow.

autonomy.levelHelper: Pick how independently ZAKI can act inside its sandbox. Supervised is recommended for everyday use.

supervised.label: Supervised (recommended)
supervised.description: Asks before medium and high risk actions. Reads, browses, and runs safe commands without asking.

full.label: Full autonomy
full.description: Acts without prompts inside the sandbox. Network and high-risk commands are still blocked.

read_only.label: Read only
read_only.description: Observes only. ZAKI can read and answer but cannot run any tools.

autonomy.proactiveHelper: This stays in assistant settings because it controls behavior, not delivery cadence.
autonomy.heartbeatHelper: Heartbeat cadence is managed by ZAKI. This switch only controls whether heartbeat delivery is enabled.

usage.unavailable: Usage is temporarily unavailable. Your bot space still works, but the daily summary did not load.
usage.pending: No usage snapshot is available yet.
usage.helper: Usage refreshes when this panel opens. The full cost breakdown will land once the runtime exposes per-period totals.

limits.currentPlanHelper: Keep premium access and billing actions in one compact row.
limits.usageUnavailable: Usage is temporarily unavailable, but ZAKI still works.
limits.usageHelper: The usage view stays compact here. Full billing and pricing stay in the main settings surface.

advanced.generalSettingsSummary: Profile, language, theme, export, and account actions live in the main settings surface.
advanced.generalSettingsHelper: This panel stays focused on ZAKI. Use the main settings surface for broader account changes.
advanced.helpSummary: Open help when you want the longer explanation behind how ZAKI works.
advanced.helpHelper: This keeps the main panel quiet while still making documentation easy to reach.

success.telegramConnected: Telegram connected. Send a message to your bot to confirm routing.

errors.onboardingLoad: Unable to load ZAKI setup right now.
errors.settingsLoad: Unable to load ZAKI settings right now.
errors.heartbeatLoad: Unable to load heartbeat status right now.
errors.botStateUnavailable: ZAKI settings are temporarily unavailable for this account.
errors.botStateUnavailableUnknownUser: ZAKI settings are not available for this account yet.
errors.sessionTimeoutRange: Session window must be between 5 and 180 minutes.
errors.telegramTokenRequired: Enter a Telegram bot token before connecting.
errors.telegramTokenInvalid: The Telegram bot token is invalid.
errors.telegramWebhookRequired: Webhook base URL is not configured yet. Ask the operator to set the workspace webhook base, or enter a valid https:// value.
errors.telegramWebhookInvalid: Webhook base URL must start with https://.
errors.telegramAllowFromRequired: Add at least one allowed Telegram chat or account ID.
errors.telegramConnectUnconfirmed: Telegram setup did not finish. Check the webhook base and webhook registration, then try again.
errors.telegramConnectStillVerifying: Telegram is still being verified. Refresh in a few seconds if your bot already responds in Telegram.
errors.telegramDisconnectUnconfirmed: Telegram still looks connected after disconnect. Refresh and try again.
errors.heartbeatSave: Unable to update heartbeat right now.
errors.invalidGroupActivation: Choose a valid group activation mode.
errors.invalidProactiveUpdates: Proactive updates must be either enabled or disabled.
errors.invalidVoiceReplies: Voice replies must be either enabled or disabled.
errors.invalidSessionTimeoutMinutes: Session timeout must be between 5 and 180 minutes.
errors.invalidAutonomy: Pick read only, supervised, or full autonomy.

sessionManagement.title: Sessions
sessionManagement.emptyHelper: Start a conversation to create one.

approvals.reasonFallback: Approval required before running this tool.

controls.sessionModeHelper: Switch how ZAKI handles the current session.
controls.footer: Use the tabs below for deeper diagnostics. This section stays focused on the current session posture.

context.noActiveSession: Start a conversation to see context diagnostics.
context.footer: Read-only. Compaction and fallback events also appear as banners above the thread.

memory.noActiveSession: Start a conversation to see memory diagnostics.
memory.noRuntime: Memory runtime is not configured on the backend{{reason}}.
memory.footer: For edit and forget actions, open the Memory pane. This tab is diagnostic only.

usage.footer: Soft-limit warning at {{warning}}% used; near-limit at {{near}}%. Hard stops still apply on hit.

errors.sessionNotReady: ZAKI session is not ready yet.

onboarding.title: Set up your workspace, {{userName}}
onboarding.subtitle: Three quick steps to make ZAKI useful from day one.
onboarding.softHint: You can keep chatting while this stays open.

simple.title: Start clean, {{userName}}
simple.subtitle: Two quick notes before you begin.

model.title: ZAKI holds the relationship. Spaces hold the work.
model.body: Use ZAKI when you want continuity, memory, and direction across time. Use Spaces when the work needs a clean place to be written, researched, or moved forward.
model.note: Think of ZAKI as the long-running thread with you. Think of each Space as a focused work surface.

spaces.title: Each Space keeps its own context.
spaces.body: Threads, files, and instructions stay inside the Space they belong to. By default, content does not jump across Spaces.
spaces.note: That means one Space for one project, topic, client, or stream of work.

space.title: Create your first space
space.body: Spaces keep topics clean. Start with one workspace for your current project.

memory.title: Tune memory behavior
memory.body: Open Memory and review what ZAKI keeps. You stay in control of every memory.

settings.title: Set your defaults
settings.body: Adjust language, theme, and profile to match how you work.

guided.fallbackCoachmark: Open this first. Spaces are used to organize chat threads.
guided.completeBody: You have the basics. Memory, Settings, and How to use stay in the profile menu whenever you need them.

spaceScopeOverview.label: Space-wide context
spaceScopeOverview.short: Instructions and documents added here apply across the whole space. Files you attach inside a chat stay in that thread.
spaceScopeOverview.openShort: Open New space first. Then you will see which context applies to the whole space versus one chat.

spaceCreated.label: Name your space
spaceCreated.short: Give your space a name, then click Create space.
spaceCreated.openShort: Open New space to create a space for one project or topic.

threadCreated.label: Create a new chat
threadCreated.short: Inside your space, click New chat. Each thread is a separate conversation.

webSearchOpened.label: Web search
webSearchOpened.short: Use this button to trigger a web-assisted reply in chat.

chatControlsOpened.label: Open chat controls
chatControlsOpened.short: Click the + button to reveal the chat controls menu.

chatToolsOverview.label: Explore chat tools
chatToolsOverview.short: From this menu, you can use Query mode, upload files, and access study, image, and agent tools.

queryModeExplained.label: Query mode
queryModeExplained.short: Use Query mode when you want ZAKI to answer from the current space documents instead of relying on general chat alone.

uploadFilesExplained.label: Upload images and files
uploadFilesExplained.short: Use this to add images or files to the current thread.

studyLearnExplained.label: Study and learn
studyLearnExplained.short: Use this when you want document-based help that prioritizes understanding and deeper exploration.

generateImageExplained.label: Generate image
generateImageExplained.short: Use this to create images directly inside the current chat.

agentModeExplained.label: Agent mode
agentModeExplained.short: Use this to hand work to an active assistant that can use tools to complete tasks.

memoryToggleOverview.label: Memory toggle
memoryToggleOverview.short: Switch between manual memory, where you confirm what ZAKI keeps, and automatic memory, where it saves useful details for you.

memoryProfileOpened.label: Open the profile menu
memoryProfileOpened.short: Click your profile card in the bottom-left corner.

memoryOpened.label: Open Memory
memoryOpened.short: Open Memory from your profile menu to review what ZAKI keeps and adjust it anytime.

spacesView.title: Spaces
spacesView.startChatAria: Start a new chat in this space

createSpaceModal.title: Create new space
createSpaceModal.subtitle: Organize chats, files, and ideas in one place.

fields.name: Space name
fields.uploadDocuments: Add files after creating the space. Uploads are embedded from the space view.

scopeNotes.spaceWideBody: Instructions and documents added to this space stay available across every chat in the space.
scopeNotes.threadSpecificBody: Files attached inside a chat stay in that thread only, so you can keep one-off context separate.

placeholders.name: Marketing research
placeholders.description: Describe what this space is for
placeholders.instructions: Add guidance for the assistant in this space

projectFiles.title: Project files
projectFiles.empty: Upload documents to ground this workspace. Embedded files stay with the whole space.

instructions.title: Instructions
instructions.fixed: ZAKI doesn't take instructions from anyone.

threads.title: Chats in this space
threads.empty: No chats yet. Start one above.

billing.upgradeSubtitle: Unlock a faster, more personal ZAKI. Manage or cancel anytime.
billing.proGate: Premium feature — upgrade to Personal to unlock.

student.label: Student
student.desc: For students who want sharper study help, writing support, and better focus.

personal.label: Personal
personal.desc: For everyday work and life when you want ZAKI to feel like your assistant.

pricingPage.title: Choose how you want to work with ZAKI
pricingPage.subtitle: Spaces is where ongoing work gets done. ZAKI is where a new interaction model is still being tested.
pricingPage.subtitleAccessActive: Your code already unlocks Personal in Spaces. The ladder stays visible here, but checkout remains paused while that access is active.

spaces.label: Spaces
spaces.title: Where work gets structured
spaces.body: Spaces is for repeat use, projects, and continuity. Personal removes the cap. Student is the same access at a lower rate.

zaki.label: ZAKI
zaki.title: Where interaction is being tested
zaki.body: ZAKI is the experimental surface. Same daily cap for everyone while we keep shaping the behavior.

pricingPage.currentPlanFree: Start free, then move up the ladder when you need more room in Spaces.

billingNotices.success: Billing update received. Your plan status will refresh shortly.
billingNotices.cancel: Checkout canceled. You can pick a plan anytime.

pricingPage.yearlyValueHint: Yearly gives you stable access all year long.

access.title: Activation code
access.description: Unlock Personal in Spaces for 30 days. ZAKI stays on the same experimental cap for everyone.

purchase.title: Buy a 30-day code
purchase.description: Use it yourself, or pass it on to someone who needs a month of Personal in Spaces.
purchase.unavailable: Code purchase is not enabled in this environment yet.
purchase.checkoutError: Unable to start code purchase checkout.

access.extendHint: Redeem another code to extend your access.

free.label: Free
free.blurb: For trying the system without committing to it yet.

student.label: Student
student.blurb: Unlimited Spaces at the student rate.

personal.label: Personal
personal.blurb: For repeat work, real continuity, and unlimited Spaces.

zaki.label: ZAKI
zaki.blurb: A state-of-the-art agent surface still being shaped in public.
features: Long-term memory is part of the test

pricingPage.studentEligibilityBody: use your .edu email at checkout, or email any proof of enrollment for manual verification at

pricingPage.cancelScheduled: Subscription will cancel at period end.
pricingPage.cancelAlreadyScheduled: Cancellation is already scheduled for period end.
pricingPage.yearlyUnavailableForPlan: Yearly pricing is not available for this plan yet.
pricingPage.yearlyUnavailable: Yearly billing is not available yet for this environment.
pricingPage.yearlyStripeOnly: Yearly billing is currently available only through Stripe.

providerModal.title: Choose payment provider
providerModal.description: Select where you want to complete checkout.

billingSuccess.title: Congrats {{name}}! You are officially in ZAKI’s friends circle 🎉
billingSuccess.subtitle: You are in. Let’s think, learn, build, and maybe ship something great together.
billingSuccess.punchlineFallback: No more generic chatbot energy. We are building personal assistant AI, and you are early on the journey.
punchlines: No more generic chatbot energy. You joined early, so you get front-row seats while we build.
ZAKI just got smarter by one awesome human. Yes, that is you.
Your subscription = fuel for better memory, better context, and sharper AI-agent workflows.
nextSteps: Start a chat and tell ZAKI what you care about so it personalizes faster.
Share ZAKI with one friend who is done with generic chat AI.
Drop us feedback anytime. Early friends shape the roadmap.
billingSuccess.shareText: {{name}} just joined ZAKI’s friends circle. Personal assistant AI > generic chat AI. Come in early.
billingSuccess.shareCopied: Invite message copied. Send it to your people.
billingSuccess.shareManual: Copy this page link and share it with your friends.

accessCode.title: Done {{name}}! Your code is being delivered ✉️
accessCode.subtitle: Your 30-day activation code has been generated after payment.
accessCode.punchline: Check your inbox now. If it does not appear, use resend below.
nextSteps: Open your email and copy the activation code.
Go to Pricing and redeem the code in the Access Code box.
Share it with a friend if you bought it for someone else.
accessCode.resendProcessing: Your code is still processing. Try again in a moment.
accessCode.resendMissing: Missing checkout session. Open Pricing and try again.

memory.conflictNotice: A memory may conflict with what ZAKI already knows
memory.savedHelper: You can undo it now or open memory any time.
memory.reviewPendingHelper: {{count}} memories need review before ZAKI keeps them.
memory.undoFailed: Undo failed. The memory is still saved.

memoryPanel.title: Memories to Review
memoryPanel.emptyBody: ZAKI will suggest new memories as you chat.
memoryPanel.footerLine1: Confirmed memories help ZAKI understand you better.
memoryPanel.footerLine2: You can always review and delete memories later.

mode.title: Memory Mode
mode.balancedHint: Save safe memories quietly and ask only when needed
mode.ask_before_savingHint: Review most memories before ZAKI keeps them
mode.save_lessHint: Be stricter about what becomes lasting memory
mode.save_moreHint: Save more safe memories without extra interruption

notebook.title: What ZAKI currently knows
notebook.body: This is the personal memory layer that helps ZAKI stay useful across your Spaces.
notebook.helper: You can change, remove, or review anything here.
notebook.recentConflicts: {{count}} possible conflicts are waiting for a decision.

about_you.title: About you
about_you.body: Stable details, identity cues, and facts ZAKI can reuse carefully.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.body: How you like to work, write, plan, or receive help.

ongoing_work.title: Ongoing work
ongoing_work.body: Projects, goals, and active context that may matter again soon.

relationships.title: Relationships
relationships.body: People or roles that help ZAKI understand your context.

recent_changes.title: Recent changes
recent_changes.body: The latest updates, reviews, and conflict signals across your memory.

personal.title: Personal memory
personal.body: Follows you across Spaces and improves future replies over time.

space.title: Space context
space.body: Files and instructions belong to the Space and stay shared inside it.

session.title: Temporary session context
session.body: Short-lived chat context helps in the moment and is only kept if it becomes useful memory.

raw.title: Raw records
raw.body: Search, filter, export, review, and resolve the underlying memory records here.

policy.helper: This preference applies to your Spaces chats and threads only.
policy.saveFailed: Unable to save your memory preference.

errors.fetchActivity: Failed to fetch recent memory activity
errors.loadActivity: Failed to load recent memory activity

delete.confirm: Delete this memory from your memory bank? This cannot be undone.

pipeline.title: What ZAKI knows
pipeline.body: Saved memories help ZAKI stay useful over time. Only sensitive or conflicting details wait here for your review.

pending.emptyBody: If something needs your approval before ZAKI keeps it, it will appear here.

conflicts.emptyBody: What ZAKI knows is currently consistent.
conflicts.help: Keep existing leaves memory unchanged. Use new replaces the stored version for this fact.

memories.emptyFilteredBody: Try a broader search query or reset the type filter.
memories.emptyBody: When ZAKI keeps something worth remembering, it will appear here and help future replies stay useful.

legal.title: Updated terms require your consent
legal.body: We updated Terms, Privacy & Compliance (policy {{policyVersion}}). Please review and accept to continue using ZAKI.
legal.errorConsentRequired: Please accept Terms, Privacy & Compliance to continue.
legal.errorSaveFailed: Unable to record consent. Please try again.

shared.expiredBody: This shared conversation link has expired and is no longer available.
shared.profileHint: Set a profile name in Settings to show your initials in shared views.
shared.footerNote: This is a read-only view of a shared conversation.
shared.footerCta: Start your own conversation on ZAKI

errors.notFound: This share link does not exist

empty.title: ZAKI hasn't learned much about you yet.
empty.cta: Migrate your memories from ChatGPT, Claude, or Gemini to see them here.

degraded.title: Graph connections are approximate
degraded.body: Semantic indexing is rebuilding. Edges shown may be incomplete until the next sync.

compose.title: Synthesize {{count}} memories
compose.contentField: What does ZAKI see across these?
